title: 🚀 v2.0.0: Codebase Inspection — Advanced codebase analysis with HTML reports, git-aware diff...
content:
Advanced codebase analysis with HTML reports, git-aware diffs, trend tracking, SVG badges, CSV export, and CI/CD integration

🆕 v2.0.0 features:
• Advanced CLI with 8+ subcommands
• JSON output for automation
• Built-in self-tests (CI-ready)
• Zero dependencies (Python stdlib)
• Cross-platform (Windows/macOS/Linux)

Free + MIT. Live on ClawHub: https://clawhub.ai/skills/skills/codebase-inspection
GitHub: https://github.com/itsPremkumar/codebase-inspection
